info.title: Financial Cents API
info.description: Financial Cents public API for managing clients, contacts, projects, templates, resources, notes, users, time activities, tasks, invoices, and client tasks. Currently in Beta - breaking changes may occur.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of clients.
Retrieve a single client by ID.
Retrieve contacts for a specific client.

post.description: Create a new contact for a client.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of attachments for a client.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of resources returned. Between 10 and 100.

post.description: Upload a file attachment to a client.

delete.description: Delete an attachment from a client.

post.description: Create a new folder for client attachments.

put.description: Move an attachment to a different folder.

parent_id.description: ID of the destination parent folder.

post.description: Move multiple attachments to a different folder.

attachment_ids[0].description: IDs of the attachments to move. Use attachment_ids[0], attachment_ids[1], etc.

parent_id.description: ID of the destination parent folder.

attachments[0].description: IDs of the attachments to delete. Use attachments[0], attachments[1], etc.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all contacts.
Retrieve a single contact by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of projects.
Retrieve a paginated list of templates.
Retrieve detailed information about a template including its tasks.

post.description: Create a new project from an existing template.

client_id.description: Client ID to associate with the project.

agents[0].description: Array of agent IDs. Use agents[0], agents[1], etc.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of resources for a project.

post.description: Create a new resource link for a project.

delete.description: Delete a resource from a project.

data.example: The record has been deleted successfully

post.description: Pin an email message to a project.

fc_id.description: The ID of the message from Financial Cents. Required if match_field is "fc_id".

provider_id.description: The message ID from the mail service provider (Outlook/Gmail). Required if match_field is "provider_id".

email_address.description: The integrated email address. Required if match_field is "provider_id".

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of resources for a client.

post.description: Create a new resource link for a client.

delete.description: Delete a resource from a client.

data.example: The record has been deleted successfully

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of notes for a client.

post.description: Create a new note for a client.

text.description: Note body text. HTML is accepted but sanitized.

get.description: Retrieve a single client note.
Retrieve a paginated list of users.
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile.
Retrieve a list of project roles.
Retrieve a paginated list of time activities with optional filters.

parameters.name: date_range[start]
parameters.description: Date range start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: date_range[end]
parameters.description: Date range end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

get.description: Retrieve a single time activity by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of tasks.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the project to filter by.

patch.description: Mark a task as complete or incomplete.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of invoices.

parameters.name: date[start]
parameters.description: Date range start. Format: Y-m-d. Required if date_range[field] is given.

parameters.name: date[end]
parameters.description: Date range end. Format: Y-m-d. Required if date_range[field] is given.

get.description: Retrieve a single invoice by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of client tasks.

patch.description: Mark a client task as complete or incomplete.

post.description: Send a client task reminder request immediately.

bearerAuth.description: Personal access token or OAuth access token. Obtain from Settings > API Settings in the Financial Cents web application.

plain_text.description: Plain text version of the note.
